summary: Orbiting logos animation feature testing completed successfully. All 6 core features verified: Mario SVG center, 9 platform logos orbiting with smooth animation, depth effect with opacity/scale variations, purple/blue energy trail visible, responsive design working on desktop and mobile, no page errors.
passed_tests: Mario SVG hologram visible in center with proper styling
Platform logos orbiting animation working smoothly
9 platform logos (AGJOGO, DGJOGO, YGJOGO, MGJOGO, HGJOGO, EGJOGO, FGJOGO, WGJOGO, BGJOGO) visible
Depth effect working - logos change size and opacity when behind
Energy trail with purple/blue conic-gradient visible around orbit path
Animation movement verified - logo positions changing over time
Responsive design - works on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844)
No JavaScript errors or console errors found
Page loads without errors after loading screen

features_tested.orbiting_logos_animation: PASS - Smooth circular animation around Mario SVG
features_tested.nine_platform_logos_visible: PASS - All 9 platform logos (AGJOGO through BGJOGO) orbiting
features_tested.depth_effect_size_opacity: PASS - Logos change size/opacity when passing behind Mario
features_tested.energy_trail_glow_effect: PASS - Purple/blue conic-gradient energy trail visible
features_tested.responsive_design_desktop: PASS - Works perfectly on 1920x1080 desktop viewport
features_tested.responsive_design_mobile: PASS - Works perfectly on 390x844 mobile viewport
features_tested.page_loads_without_errors: PASS - No JavaScript errors, clean console output

visual_verification.mario_svg_center: PASS - Mario hologram clearly visible in center with proper styling

visual_verification.energy_effects: PASS - Purple/blue energy trail and glow effects visible
visual_verification.depth_3d_effect: PASS - Logos appear smaller and dimmer when behind, larger and brighter in front
visual_verification.smooth_animation: PASS - Continuous smooth rotation without stuttering
visual_verification.color_scheme: PASS - Purple (#7c3aed) and blue (#3b82f6) energy colors consistent

technical_implementation.framer_motion_usage: PASS - useAnimationFrame for smooth rotation animation
technical_implementation.depth_calculation: PASS - sin(angle) based depth calculation working correctly
